canonical_question: What are SaaS expansion revenue benchmarks - upsell and cross-sell as percentage of new ARR?
constraints: Benchmarks vary dramatically by ARR scale -- a $2M ARR company and a $200M ARR company have fundamentally different expansion profiles; always segment by revenue stage
Expansion revenue ratios depend heavily on pricing model -- usage-based and seat-based models naturally generate more expansion than flat subscriptions
NRR above 100% masks underlying churn; always pair expansion metrics with gross revenue retention (GRR) to see the full picture
Customer segment mix (SMB vs mid-market vs enterprise) shifts expansion benchmarks by 20-30 percentage points; comparing across segments is misleading
Public company benchmarks overrepresent successful companies; private company medians are typically 5-15 points lower on NRR

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs overall SaaS financial health metrics (Rule of 40, magic number, burn multiple)
User needs churn and retention benchmarks rather than expansion
User needs pricing strategy guidance rather than benchmarks

inputs_needed.question: What is the company's current ARR range?
What is the primary customer segment?
